# FormSuite

> FormSuite builds lightweight Google Workspace add-ons for Google Forms and Google Sheets operators.

## Core Pages

- [FormSuite homepage](https://formsuite.dev/): Product index for FormSuite Google Workspace add-ons.
- [FormFlow](https://formsuite.dev/formflow/): Google Forms approval workflow add-on for reviewer emails, approve/reject links, and linked Google Sheets status tracking.
- [FormFlow guide](https://formsuite.dev/formflow/google-forms-approval-workflow-guide.html): Guide to planning a Google Forms approval workflow.
- [Form Approvals alternative](https://formsuite.dev/formflow/form-approvals-alternative-google-forms.html): Comparison page for users who want a lightweight alternative to a broader Google Forms approval platform.
- [Form Approvals pricing alternative](https://formsuite.dev/formflow/form-approvals-pricing-alternative.html): Pricing-intent page for users deciding whether they need a full approval platform or a lightweight approve/reject workflow.
- [Free Google Forms approval workflow](https://formsuite.dev/formflow/free-google-forms-approval-workflow.html): Free-intent guide for starting with one form, one approver, one decision email, and linked-Sheet status tracking.
- [Power Automate alternative](https://formsuite.dev/formflow/power-automate-approval-workflow-alternative-google-forms.html): Migration guide for lightweight Microsoft Forms or Power Automate approval workflows moving to Google Forms.
- [Approve/reject by email](https://formsuite.dev/formflow/approve-reject-google-forms-responses-by-email.html): Explains reviewer email decision links and Sheet writeback.
- [Approval status in Google Sheets](https://formsuite.dev/formflow/google-forms-approval-status-in-google-sheets.html): Explains Pending, Approved, and Rejected status tracking in the linked response Sheet.
- [First workflow test](https://formsuite.dev/formflow/test-google-forms-approval-workflow-before-launch.html): Checklist for testing one internal approval workflow before launch.

## Key Facts

- FormFlow is a Google Workspace Marketplace add-on for Google Forms approval workflows.
- FormFlow focuses on lightweight approve/reject workflows, not full procurement, ticketing, CRM, or compliance systems.
- FormFlow sends reviewer emails, captures approve/reject decisions, and writes approval status back to the linked Google Sheets response file.
- FormFlow is positioned as a lightweight option for users who find broader approval platforms too heavy for a simple Google Forms workflow.
- Google Workspace, Google Forms, and Google Sheets are trademarks of Google LLC.

## Contact

- Website: https://formsuite.dev/
- Support: https://formsuite.dev/formflow/support.html

Last updated: 2026-06-28
## Sheet Formula Helper

- Sheet Formula Helper: https://formsuite.dev/sheetformula/ — Online tool for fixing, explaining, and generating Google Sheets and Excel formulas.
- Google Sheets Formula Fixer: https://formsuite.dev/sheetformula/google-sheets-formula-fixer.html — Fix #N/A, parse errors, wrong ranges, lookup mode, and IFERROR patterns in Google Sheets formulas.
- Excel Formula Fixer: https://formsuite.dev/sheetformula/excel-formula-fixer.html — Fix Excel formulas with lookup, reference, separator, and error-handling problems.
- VLOOKUP Formula Fixer: https://formsuite.dev/sheetformula/vlookup-formula-fixer.html — Fix VLOOKUP exact-match, #N/A, return-column, and lookup-left issues.
- Google Sheets Formula Generator: https://formsuite.dev/sheetformula/google-sheets-formula-generator.html — Generate starter formulas from plain English rules.
- Formula Explainer: https://formsuite.dev/sheetformula/formula-explainer.html — Explain Google Sheets and Excel formulas in plain English.
- Support: https://formsuite.dev/sheetformula/support.html
- Privacy: https://formsuite.dev/sheetformula/privacy.html
- Terms: https://formsuite.dev/sheetformula/terms.html

## FormRanger Dropdown Guides

- FormRanger: https://formsuite.dev/formranger/ — Google Forms add-on for syncing dropdown, multiple-choice, checkbox, and grid choices from selected Google Sheets data.
- Auto update Google Forms dropdown from Google Sheets: https://formsuite.dev/formranger/auto-update-google-forms-dropdown-from-google-sheets.html
- Google Forms dropdown from Google Sheets without Apps Script: https://formsuite.dev/formranger/google-forms-dropdown-from-google-sheets-without-apps-script.html
- Google Forms dropdown not updating from Google Sheets: https://formsuite.dev/formranger/google-forms-dropdown-not-updating-from-google-sheets.html
- Google Forms dependent dropdown from Sheets: https://formsuite.dev/formranger/google-forms-dependent-dropdown-from-google-sheets.html
